certificate.moduleName: Wave Relay® Kernel Space Crypto Module
certificate.caveat: When operated in approved mode; No assurance of minimum security of SSPs (e.g., keys, bit strings) that are externally loaded
certificate.description: Persistent Systems LLC Wave Relay® Kernel Space Crypto Module is a Software-Hybrid cryptographic module operating on a single-chip device that provides FIPS validated cryptographic algorithms which are used by kernel space system services & protocols (e.g. Wave Relay, IPsec, etc.).

vendor.name: Persistent Systems, LLC

sections.title: Tested and Vendor Affirmed Module Version and Identification

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: Role Based Authentication
sensitiveSecurityParameters.strength: RSA 3072-bit has a security strength of 128 bits. The probability of successfully guessing the private key is 1/(2^128).

extraColumns.Strength per Minute: Each authentication attempt takes approximately 8.4 seconds, which results in a maximum of seven authentication attempts per minute. The probably of a brute force attack being successful within a given minute is 7/(2^128).

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: System Memory (S1)
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: Stored in plaintext in volatile memory (RAM).

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: Binary (S2)
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: Stored in plaintext as part of the module binary itself.

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: CTR_DRBG- State
sensitiveSecurityParameters.strength: V is 128, Key is 128 to 256 - 128 to 256

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: HMAC_DRB G-State
sensitiveSecurityParameters.strength: V is 160 to 512, Key is 160 to 512 - 128 to 256

services.name: Non- Approved
services.description: The module is capable of non- approved services in the non-approved mode of operation only.

services.name: AES (GCM) - Hybrid
services.approvedFunctions: Hybrid Authenticated Symmetric Encryption/Decryption using internally generated IV HW: Encrypt, Decrypt SW: Message Authentication

services.approvedFunctions: Message Authentication used independently from AES(GCM)

services.approvedFunctions: Hybrid Authenticated Symmetric Encryption/Decryption HW: Encrypt, Decrypt SW: Message Authentication

services.name: AES (cbcmac)
services.approvedFunctions: Message Authentication used independently from AES(CCM)

services.name: AES (XTS) - Hybrid
services.approvedFunctions: Hybrid Disk Encryption HW: First encryption SW: Second encryption

services.name: ENT (SW)
services.approvedFunctions: Software Entropy Source (Jitterentropy) for DRBG Seeding

services.approvedFunctions: Hash DRBG: (A4589) HMAC DRBG: (A4589) Counter DRBG: (A4589)

services.name: SF7
services.approvedFunctions: Hash DRBG: (A4589) HMAC DRBG: (A4589) Counter DRBG: (A4589)
